summary: Completed testing of 3 bundled memorization improvements in MemorizationMode.jsx - Iteration 23. All features verified: 1) Play bug fix (AnimatePresence without mode='wait' for immediate transitions), 2) Progressive blur / memorization ladder (4-pass system: Full Text → Light Blur → Heavy Blur → Off-Book), 3) End-of-scene prompt (Pass Complete card with Repeat/Harder/Done options for My Lines, Run Complete with Run Again/Done for Line Run).
passed_tests: My Lines tab: tap through all lines reaches 'Pass Complete' screen (data-testid='my-lines-complete') - PASS
My Lines tab: 'Repeat' button (data-testid='my-lines-repeat') restarts at same blur level - PASS
My Lines tab: 'Harder' button (data-testid='my-lines-harder') increases blur and restarts - PASS
My Lines tab: blur ladder progression - Full Text (blur-0), Light Blur (blur-[3px]), Heavy Blur (blur-[8px]), Off-Book (blur-[20px]) - PASS
My Lines tab: blur-level-label shows correct level (Light Blur, Heavy Blur, Off-Book) - PASS
My Lines tab: at blur level 3 (Off-Book), 'Harder' button is NOT shown (only Repeat and Done) - PASS
My Lines tab: 'Done' button (data-testid='my-lines-done') closes memorization overlay - PASS
My Lines tab: cue peek ('show cue' button) works at all blur levels (0-3) - PASS
Line Run tab: first tap on 'Tap to reveal your line' (data-testid='reveal-line-button') works immediately - PASS
Line Run tab: completing all lines shows completion screen with 'Run Again' and 'Done' buttons - PASS
Line Run tab: 'Run Again' button (data-testid='run-again-button') visible on completion - PASS
Line Run tab: 'Done' button (data-testid='run-done-button') closes memorization overlay - PASS
Line Run tab: transitions between lines feel immediate (AnimatePresence without mode='wait', 120ms duration) - PASS
My Lines tab: transitions between lines feel immediate (AnimatePresence without mode='wait', 120ms duration) - PASS
Memorization overlay opens correctly from Memorize button - PASS
All 4 tabs visible: My Lines, Line Run, Reader, Cue & Recall - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: MemorizationMode.jsx lines 282-288: AnimatePresence without mode='wait' for My Lines - immediate transitions confirmed
MemorizationMode.jsx lines 390-396: AnimatePresence without mode='wait' for Line Run - immediate transitions confirmed
MemorizationMode.jsx lines 61-62: blurIntensity and passLabels arrays correctly define 4-level blur ladder
MemorizationMode.jsx lines 207-249: Pass Complete screen with Repeat/Harder/Done buttons correctly implemented
MemorizationMode.jsx lines 231-239: Harder button conditionally hidden when blurLevel >= 3 (Off-Book)
MemorizationMode.jsx lines 357-372: Line Run completion screen with Run Again and Done buttons
MemorizationMode.jsx lines 309-315: show cue button with stopPropagation to prevent line advancement
seed_data_creation: Used existing Felix script (21 scenes, BOOKED mode) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: MemorizationMode improvements fully tested. Key features: 1) Progressive blur ladder with 4 levels (Full Text, Light Blur, Heavy Blur, Off-Book) applied via blur-0, blur-[3px], blur-[8px], blur-[20px] classes. 2) End-of-scene prompts: My Lines shows 'Pass Complete' with Repeat/Harder/Done; Line Run shows 'Run Complete' with Run Again/Done. 3) Harder button hidden at Off-Book level. 4) AnimatePresence without mode='wait' ensures immediate transitions (120ms). 5) Show cue button works at all blur levels. All data-testid attributes verified: memorization-overlay, memorization-mylines-tab, memorization-linerun-tab, my-line-text, my-lines-complete, my-lines-repeat, my-lines-harder, my-lines-done, blur-level-label, reveal-line-button, run-again-button, run-done-button, show-cue-button.

play_bug_fix.details: AnimatePresence without mode='wait' in both My Lines (line 282) and Line Run (line 390) - transitions are immediate with 120ms duration

progressive_blur_ladder.details: 4-pass system: Full Text (blur-0), Light Blur (blur-[3px]), Heavy Blur (blur-[8px]), Off-Book (blur-[20px])

blur_level_label.details: blur-level-label shows current level (hidden at level 0, shows Light Blur/Heavy Blur/Off-Book at levels 1-3)

harder_button_progression.details: Harder button shows next level name and increases blur; hidden at Off-Book (level 3)

repeat_button.details: Restarts at same blur level, resets myLineIndex to 0

done_button_my_lines.details: Calls onClose to close memorization overlay

show_cue_button.details: Works at all blur levels (0-3), reveals cue text with stopPropagation

line_run_reveal.details: First tap on reveal button works immediately, shows Nailed it/Peeked buttons

line_run_completion.details: Shows Run Complete with Nailed/Peeked counts, Run Again and Done buttons

run_again_button.details: Resets runIndex, lineRevealed, and results to restart Line Run

run_done_button.details: Calls onClose to close memorization overlay
